problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to it, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
